question_html: Write a short paragraph on “Cyberbullying”.
solution_html:
Cyberbullying

Cyberbullying is the use of digital platforms, such as social media, messaging apps and websites, to harass, intimidate or harm others. It can take many forms, including spreading rumors, sending hurtful messages, or sharing embarrassing photos or videos without consent. Unlike traditional bullying, cyberbullying can happen 24/7, often causing victims to feel helpless and isolated. The anonymity of the internet allows bullies to target individuals without immediate consequences, making it harder for victims to escape. This can have severe emotional and psychological effects, leading to anxiety, depression, or even suicidal thoughts. Prevention and intervention are crucial, with efforts to educate both children and adults about the impact of online behavior and promote respect in digital spaces. Legal measures and online platform policies also play a significant role in combating cyberbullying.

Marks Distribution:

01 mark for mentioning, Cyberbullying is the use of digital platforms, such as social media, messaging apps and websites, to harass, intimidate or harm others.

01 mark for mentioning, It can take many forms, including spreading rumors, sending hurtful messages, or sharing embarrassing photos or videos without consent.

0.5 mark for mentioning, this can have severe emotional and psychological effects, leading to anxiety, depression, or even suicidal thoughts.

[N.B: 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]

The working class people are the main asset of Bangladesh. The farmers of this country are producing food for us. The laborers are earning foreign exchange by working in different countries of the world. They are contributing significantly to the socioeconomic development of the country. The working class people have been keeping the country alive.
